description_long: This rifle features a striking, angular design with a predominantly glossy red finish accented by black and gold components. The body is robust and futuristic, with a large upper receiver and a prominent barrel assembly extending forward. The grip and trigger area are integrated into the lower section, with a visible handle for carrying or aiming. The rifle's side panels are sleek, with mechanical details and vent-like structures suggesting advanced technology. The front end includes a small, cylindrical muzzle device, while the rear is capped with a gold-colored end piece. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer, giving it a modern, high-tech appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic, glossy red rifle with black and gold accents, featuring a robust, angular body and advanced mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the red panels, black mechanical components, and gold end cap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the muzzle device, sighting system, and the compact, symmetrical profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with similar visibility of the red and black body and gold rear cap.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the gold end cap and the streamlined, narrow profile of the rifle's stock and barrel.
